Interface IVersion

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members for managing a version.

[Guid("1A945841-B381-11D1-9CE6-0000F8780619")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IVersion

Properties

Access

The version's access permission.

esriVersionAccess Access { get; set; }

Property Value

esriVersionAccess

Examples

Sample Snippet

Description

The version's description.

string Description { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsRedefined

Determines whether the state of the version corresponding to this version object has been redefined in the database.

bool IsRedefined { get; }

Property Value

bool

Sample Snippet

string Owner { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Sample Snippet

This version's information.

IVersionInfo VersionInfo { get; }

IVersionInfo

Sample Snippet

VersionLocks

This version's locks.

IEnumLockInfo VersionLocks { get; }

Property Value

IEnumLockInfo

VersionName

The name of the version.

string VersionName { get; set; }
